amendments_note: spec 07 §1/§6.1: this run applies the degrade-to-uncapped amendment (ABC weights are properties of the shared posterior, applicable to any corridor under the same draws). The amendment itself rides N6; this artifact is its operational record.

candidate_universe.substitution_note: spec 07 §4.3: the candidate pool is meant to come from the stage-1 DRM screen re-run against the updated network (gate 1). Until spec 01 lands, the candidate universe is HAND-SUPPLIED -- the 13-arterial HANDOFF shortlist is the natural seed. This N1b run supplies the TWO corridors that already have committed configs + derived files [harbor, streetcar], which is exactly the point: 2 candidates -> 2 singles + 2 directional pairs + trivial swaps at full N=40,000 CRN, small enough to prove the sequencing machinery end to end. More candidates arrive with stage 1. This substitution is surfaced in the primary artifact (network_sequence.json.candidate_universe.hand_supplied).

archetype_gap.reason: archetypes are owner-designed complete networks with declared internal build orders (spec 07 §5.3 / §11 Q3); the harness must not generate them (a generator reintroduces the combinatorial problem this spec declines to solve). N3 supplies config/archetypes/*.json + the matched-capital gap series; until then the safeguard comparison line carries greedy vs best-single only.

cv.timing_split_note: interim: delta = 1 (welfare-minutes are a level, never discounted); the one-cycle_gap deferral shows only in the Delta-K_PV display
interim: delta = 1 (welfare-minutes are a level, never discounted); the one-cycle_gap deferral shows only in the Delta-K_PV display

capital_delta_K_pv.discount_note: Delta-K_PV display only (spec 07 §3); interim welfare is never discounted. rate 7% real, BCA-wrapper property, cited not owned

commitment.rationale: harbor = argmax CV (own Delta-wm P50 158,205 + continuation 54,247 = CV 212,361).

welfare_per_dollar_ratio_DISPLAY_ONLY.label: INTERIM / DISPLAY ONLY -- never quoted as BCA output

interaction_matrix.tau_caveat: tau pinning (spec 07 §8a) pins transfer volume to a share of base boardings, so cross-line synergy in the objective is MUTED -- this interaction estimate is a lower bound on true complementarity; records-request item 3 is the eventual fix

swap_results.note: runner-up-only bounded swap (spec 07 §5.2); no committed HYPOTHETICAL line was displaced -- with 2 candidates the swap suffix is trivial (the runner-up is the sole alternative). Built (asbuilt) lines are never swapped.

archetype_gap.reason: archetypes are owner-designed complete networks with declared internal build orders (spec 07 §5.3 / §11 Q3); the harness must not generate them (a generator reintroduces the combinatorial problem this spec declines to solve). N3 supplies config/archetypes/*.json + the matched-capital gap series; until then the safeguard comparison line carries greedy vs best-single only.

cv.timing_split_note: interim: delta = 1 (welfare-minutes are a level, never discounted); the one-cycle_gap deferral shows only in the Delta-K_PV display

capital_delta_K_pv.discount_note: Delta-K_PV display only (spec 07 §3); interim welfare is never discounted. rate 7% real, BCA-wrapper property, cited not owned

commitment.rationale: streetcar = argmax CV (own Delta-wm P50 54,247 + continuation 0 = CV 54,247).

welfare_per_dollar_ratio_DISPLAY_ONLY.label: INTERIM / DISPLAY ONLY -- never quoted as BCA output

swap_results.note: runner-up-only bounded swap (spec 07 §5.2); no committed HYPOTHETICAL line was displaced -- with 2 candidates the swap suffix is trivial (the runner-up is the sole alternative). Built (asbuilt) lines are never swapped.

frontier.aggregation: within-draw (spec 07 §3): sum lines per draw, then percentiles
frontier.flyvbjerg_annotation: portfolio optimism is worse than single-project optimism -- forecast errors are correlated across the model's lines (spec 05 §4.3; within-draw aggregation makes this arithmetic, not rhetoric).

sigma_struct_row.note: per-line idiosyncratic structural error (sigma_struct, spec 07 §8g); the within-draw sum carries only the correlated parameter component, so the portfolio bands are otherwise too narrow. Named here, landed at N4.

governance_note: in-run commitments are RECOMMENDATIONS (spec 07 §1); spec 00 §3 gate discipline applies at each REAL programmatic commitment. Each line's forecast of record remains its own stage-3 STOPS run.

kernel_set.note: spec 07 §6.1: all candidates ranked under the SHARED OC posterior (the 543_launch_s500 ABC weights), uncapped alongside; identical across corridors under CRN, so computed once per cycle. ESS reported for every ABC-weighted statistic (spec 02 §4.4 ESS<1000 saturation rule).

objective.note: INTERIM (spec 07 §3): the full-NPV objective is N5, gated on R1 -> R6 -> W1. Delta-K shown as the spec 04 LOW | US-TYPICAL band; welfare-per-dollar ratio is a display column only.

provenance_report.dependency_predicate: depends = omega>0.01 OR co-located persistent injection OR feeder/transfer edge in the rebuilt inputs.
provenance_report.depth_rule: depth(measured)=0; depth(eval)=1+max{depth(H): H hypothetical in network-before AND candidate depends on H}; committed line inherits eval depth; cap 2 -> EXPLORATORY, excluded from gate memos (spec 07 §6.2).
provenance_report.flyvbjerg: network optimism > single-project optimism (correlated errors); the depth cap is the control (spec 07 §6.2).
provenance_report.operating_mode: a planning tool re-run between real build cycles as lines open and forecasts become measurements; provenance depth resets from the updated network_asbuilt each re-run (spec 07 §6.2).

safeguard_comparison.note: safeguard = max{greedy portfolio, best single feasible, best feasible archetype}; the archetype leg lands with N3.

sensitivity.base_objective_note: committed-order cumulative welfare-minutes P50 (final portfolio, within-draw)

computed_n1b.note: cycle_gap is Delta-K_PV display only; welfare objective invariant (interim: level, not discounted)
cycle_gap is Delta-K_PV display only; welfare objective invariant (interim: level, not discounted)
depth_cap 1 relabels the exploratory tail; objective invariant
depth_cap 3 relabels the exploratory tail; objective invariant

named_spec_pending.note: order-difference diagnostic over the top-3 candidates (spec 07 §5.1)
per-line independent structural error on portfolio bands (§8g)
R2 premium-bracket rows on every stop decision (§6.1)

stopping_record.bcr_rule_note: the BCR < 1 marginal stop is N5's NPV mode; the interim layer stops on budget exhaustion or candidate exhaustion and reports the economic margin at which it emptied (spec 07 §7).
stopping_record.shadow_price_note: under a binding budget the marginal committed line's welfare margin is the shadow-price cutoff (spec 07 §7); it exceeds the null continuation, so the hurdle was not merely 0.
